hero.title: Decentralized finance redefined.
hero.subtitle: Secure, beautiful, and borderless self-custody for the next billion users.

vision.title: Crypto that belongs to you.
vision.subtitle: We built Vaulta because the future of finance should be open, secure, and above all, owned by the people who use it.

pillars.title: Universal Access
pillars.desc: No boundaries, no borders. Finance should be as simple as sending a text message.

pillars.title: True Sovereignty
pillars.desc: Your keys, your crypto. We believe in a world where users are their own banks.

pillars.title: Modular Future
pillars.desc: Built for evolution. Our protocol adapts to the next generation of Web3.

manifesto: Centralized exchanges have failed the promise of blockchain. By holding assets on behalf of users, they replicate the very systems they were meant to replace.
Vaulta is our answer. A modular, high-performance gateway to the decentralized world where privacy is a right, security is a standard, and self-custody is the only path forward.

careers.title: Build the Invisible.
careers.subtitle: We're looking for architects, dreamers, and skeptics to help us rebuild the financial infrastructure of the world.

culture.title: Radical Transparency
culture.desc: Open source is in our DNA. We build in public and trust by default.

culture.title: Security First
culture.desc: We don't ship until it's bulletproof. Excellence is our only baseline.

culture.title: Infinite Growth
culture.desc: We invest heavily in our team's evolution. Learn fast, build faster.

careers.ctaText: We are always looking for exceptional talent. If you have a vision for the future of finance, reach out to us at careers@vaulta.io

blog.title: Frontier Updates.
blog.subtitle: Insights, news, and deep dives into the future of decentralization.
blog.newsletterText: Subscribe to our monthly newsletter for the latest insights, protocol updates, and ecosystem news.
